summary: Iteration 57 - Avatar Video Preview with Kling Avatar v2 Lip-Sync. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all expected UI elements including avatar name input, language selector (PT/EN/ES), and video preview integration.

BACKEND_1_avatar_video_preview_post.details: Accepts avatar_url, voice_url, voice_id, language parameters. Returns job_id for polling. Model AvatarVideoPreviewRequest validated (line 3131).

BACKEND_2_tts_audio_generation.details: When no custom voice_url provided, TTS audio generated via OpenAI TTS using voice_id (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer). Uses emergentintegrations.llm.openai.OpenAITextToSpeech.

BACKEND_3_kling_avatar_v2_integration.details: Uses fal_client.submit_async for Kling Avatar v2 at 'fal-ai/kling-video/ai-avatar/v2/standard'. Sends image_url and audio_url for lip-sync.

BACKEND_4_avatar_video_preview_polling.details: Returns status and video_url when completed. Statuses: processing, generating_video, completed, failed.

BACKEND_5_preview_texts_dictionary.details: PREVIEW_TEXTS dict contains test phrases in pt, en, es languages.

FRONTEND_1_avatar_name_input.details: Avatar name input field with data-testid='avatar-name-input' appears in customize stage. Value bound to avatarName state.

FRONTEND_2_avatar_name_saved.details: saveAvatarAndClose function uses avatarName when saving avatar.

FRONTEND_3_language_selector.details: Language selector shows 3 buttons (PT/EN/ES) below 'Language:' label in video preview section. Bound to previewLanguage state.

FRONTEND_4_video_preview_sends_params.details: Generate preview button sends avatar_url, voice_url (voice.url), voice_id (voice.voice_id), language (previewLanguage) to backend.

FRONTEND_5_regenerate_button.details: Regenerate button appears after video is generated (when previewVideoUrl is set). Clicking sets previewVideoUrl to null to allow re-generation.

keys_verified: studio.avatar_name_placeholder (en: 'Name your avatar...', pt: 'Nome do avatar...', es: 'Nombre del avatar...')

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57: Avatar Video Preview uses Kling Avatar v2 via fal.ai for lip-sync. POST /avatar-video-preview accepts avatar_url, voice_url, voice_id, language. TTS generated via OpenAI TTS when no custom voice. Frontend: avatar-name-input at line 2082, language selector PT/EN/ES at line 2391, regenerate button at line 2384. Translation keys avatar_name_placeholder, test_language, regenerate exist in all 3 locales. Note: Full lip-sync generation takes 2-3 minutes so tests only verify endpoint acceptance, not full generation completion.

_run_preview_generation_function.description: Background thread that generates TTS audio if needed, then calls Kling Avatar v2 for lip-sync video generation

languages: pt: 'Olá! Eu sou seu apresentador virtual...'
